case.title: FARBENFABRIKEN BAYER A. G. v. UNITED STATES

opinion.h1: FARBENFABRIKEN BAYER A. G. v. UNITED STATES, 393 U.S. 216 (1968)
opinion.h4: FARBENFABRIKEN BAYER A. G. v. UNITED STATES. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE DISTRICT OF COLUMBIA. No. 504. Decided November 25, 1968.
opinion.p: Allen F. Maulsby, Arnold M. Lerman, Max O. Truitt, Jr., and Daniel K. Mayers for appellant.
Solicitor General Griswold for the United States.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed.
393 U.S. 216 GREEN v. TURNER, WARDEN. ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF CERTIORARI TO THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE TENTH CIRCUIT. No. 88, Misc. Decided November 25, 1968.
Phil L. Hansen, Attorney General of Utah, for respondent.

The motion for leave to proceed in forma pauperis and the petition for a writ of certiorari are granted. The judgment is vacated and the case is remanded to the Court of Appeals for further consideration in light of Garrison v. Patterson, 391 U.S. 464.
